extractedFields.location: Outer Ring Road, Near Marathahalli Bridge, Bengaluru, Karnataka - 560037
extractedFields.description: The policyholder was involved in a head-on collision with a truck that crossed the median. The policyholder sustained multiple injuries including a fractured left arm and whiplash injury to the neck. She was immediately hospitalized at Manipal Hospital, Whitefield. The truck driver fled the scene. A bystander noted the vehicle number: KA-09-C-1122. Police FIR filed at Marathahalli Police Station (FIR No. BLR-2025-5501).

reasoning: Claim type is identified as "Injury", which involves personal injury. Injury claims require specialist medical assessment, legal review, and rehabilitation coordination. Note: 9 missing field(s) detected — the specialist team will also need to collect these: [Policy Effective Date, Incident Time, Incident Location, Incident Description, Claimant Name, Claimant Phone, Asset ID, Attachments, Initial Estimate].
